mission.title: cozystack: monitor-agents  failed to install after upgraded to v1.0.0-rc.1
mission.description: monitor-agents  failed to install after upgraded to v1.0.0-rc.1. This issue affects 1+ users.

steps.title: Identify cozystack troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your cozystack deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=cozystack
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cozystack -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `calling include: template: cozy-monitoring-agents/charts/fluent-bit/templates/configmap.yaml:16:9: executing "cozy-monit`

steps.title: Check current Configmap configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cozystack resources:
```bash
kubectl get configmap -A
kubectl describe configmap <name> -n <namespace>
```
**Describe the bug**
monitor-agents  failed to install after upgraded to v1.0.0-rc.1.

HelmRelease event decoded:
```
Warning InstallFailed 5s (x6 over 53s) helm-controller Helm install failed for rel

steps.title: Apply the fix for monitor-agents  failed to install after upgraded to v1.0.0-r
steps.description:
PR #2075 introduced `_cluster.cluster-domain` references in monitoring-agents `values.yaml` for FQDN resolution in tenant clusters. This broke the fluent-bit subchart because `_cluster` values are not accessible from the Helm subchart context — only `global` values are shared with subcharts.

This P
```yaml
Warning InstallFailed 5s (x6 over 53s) helm-controller Helm install failed for release cozy-monitoring/monitoring-agents with chart cozy-monitoring-agents@0.0.0+1b5894e823dc: template: cozy-monitoring-agents/charts/fluent-bit/templates/daemonset.yaml:37:28: executing "cozy-monitoring-agents/charts/fluent-bit/templates/daemonset.yaml" at <include (print $.Template.BasePath "/configmap.yaml")>: error calling include: template: cozy-monitoring-agents/charts/fluent-bit/templates/configmap.yaml:16:9: executing "cozy-monitoring-agents/charts/fluent-bit/templates/configmap.yaml" at <tpl .Values.confi
```

steps.title: Confirm monitor-agents  failed to install after upgraded t is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cozystack -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `calling include: template: cozy-monitoring-agents/charts/fluent-bit/templates/configmap.yaml:16:9: executing "cozy-monit` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: PR #2075 introduced `_cluster.cluster-domain` references in monitoring-agents `values.yaml` for FQDN resolution in tenant clusters. This broke the fluent-bit subchart because `_cluster` values are not accessible from the Helm subchart context — only `global` values are shared with subcharts.

This PR replaces `_cluster` references with a new `global.clusterDomain` variable:
- Empty by default (man. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cozystack installed or the issue environment reproducible.
